gap_timeframe_contract.sentence: SLGB gap/timeframe map: BOTTOM_RELOAD_LONG / REAL_CLEAR_HIGHWAY_NO_MAPPED_OVERHEAD; price 0.65; support stack 15; parent weekly 0.63-0.64; no mapped overhead; channel FLAT 10m AT_LOWER.

why: deep bullish gap stack under price

long_to_wall_plan.invalid_if: price fails source surge or parent support is breached; shadow only until scored

rejection_short_plan.trigger: after wall touch, wait for dump/rejection fire below the wall
